penalties.description: Maximum time reached without completion. Final suture cutting not observed within time limit.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude reported incomplete task at 420 seconds while GPT reported completion at 300 seconds. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and Claude's specific observation that final suture cutting was not visible within the time limit, the incomplete task assessment takes precedence per rubric automatic-zero conditions.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment of incomplete task at maximum time is more conservative and aligns with the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks in the rubric.

claude_value.description: Maximum time reached without completion. Final suture cutting not observed within time limit.

gpt_value.description: Unable to fully assess the final slit closure due to limited visibility.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic-zero condition that supersedes visibility-based assessment penalties. Claude's specific observation about missing final suture cutting is more definitive.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of other performance metrics.
